# ErrorRegistry.InvalidCursorCode field

The `-32602` alias used when an invalid or expired cursor is supplied (§18, §22.4). It is the SAME value as [`InvalidParams`](../../Stackific.Mcp.JsonRpc/ErrorCodes/InvalidParams.md) — a documented alias, never a distinct code.

```csharp
public const int InvalidCursorCode;
```
